data.title: Hoshi Uranai Kirakira
data.synopsis: Music video for the song by Shounen Shoujo Gasshou Dan Mizuumi featured on NHK's Minna no Uta program.

data.title: Kenka no Ato wa
data.synopsis: Music video for the song Kenka no Ato wa by Shimon Masato that was featured on Fuji TV's Hirake! Ponkikki program.

data.title: Cabbage UFO
data.synopsis: Music video for the song by Kumi Konno featured on NHK's Minna no Uta program.

titles.title: 展覧会で逢った女の子

data.title: Tenrankai de Atta Onnanoko
data.title_japanese: 展覧会で逢った女の子
data.synopsis: Music video for the song Tenrankai de Atta Onnanoko by Arai Man. Aired as part of NHK's Minna no Uta program.

data.title: Pata Pata Mama
data.synopsis: Music video for the song Pata Pata Mama by Ikuyo Inoko that was featured on Fuji TV's Hirake! Ponkikki program.

data.title: Bubaga
data.synopsis: A bizzare exploration claymation anime about a pig with some live-action bits incorporated.

data.title: Daisuki! Nendomama
data.synopsis: Claymation about a loving blob mother and her blob son. Each episode is a simple glimpse into their 'normal' lives.

data.title: Saikin Ponta
data.synopsis: A slice of life anime about Ponta, a bacteria; and his mother and father, and his girlfriend Maki-chan.

titles.title: とこちゃんちょっきん

data.title: Toko-chan Chokkin
data.title_japanese: とこちゃんちょっきん
data.synopsis: Follows the daily life of Toko-chan, a cute cave girl and her best friend.

titles.title: ストローザウルス ネオ

data.title: Straw-saurus Neo
data.title_japanese: ストローザウルス ネオ
data.synopsis: Straw-saurus Neo is a small dinosaur from space. He came looking for his friend who has gone missing and sets out to find him in the sandy wilds of the planet.

data.title: Rescue YoYo
data.synopsis: Stop-motion animation about robots who only say "YoYo" and the rescue operation needed to help a robot duckling cross a river.

data.title: Tsunagaru Animal
data.synopsis: As the forest begins to thaw, animals are looking forward to spring. But they need to help each other to survive the period of when the flora has not yet produced food.

data.title: Kakinoki Mokkii
data.synopsis: A persimmon tree wants to grow more fruit and a crow wants to get over his fear of flying. They end up working together to achieve what the both want.

data.title: Rainbow no Anime Bako
data.synopsis: A boy looks into a box and sees a rainbow kaleidoscope display. But every time the boy looks in, the images change.

data.title: Talpy
data.synopsis: Talpy is an odd creature than can transform into anything be it a bicycle or cowboy or a tailor. Every episode shows Talpy transforming into a few items/people based on the scenario he's in.

data.title: Paniponi
data.synopsis: A slice of life anime about a bunch of animals living in Paniponi village.

data.title: Karasu no Puuta
data.synopsis: An anime aimed at kindergarteners for the sole purpose of teaching how eating different things make you poop differently and how to maintain a regular digestive schedule (so as to avoid constipation or diarrhea).

data.title: Kappa no Suribachi
data.synopsis: Based on a children's book of the same name. A kappa and his mother live by themselves in the river. He makes friends with the village children until one day a child drowned by accident due to his neglect. The village adults deemed the kappa family at fault and they were going to be eliminated until a plague hit the village. People started dying but the kappa family had a cure. By using the potion knowledge of his mother and the special mortar deep under water, together they were able to make medicine to save the villagers. But after the events, can either group forgive each other?

data.title: Kyouryou Pikora
data.synopsis: Pikora is a newborn baby dinosaur. But here mother is nowhere to be found. She sets off into the woods to find her.

titles.title: なんじゃもんじゃおばけ

data.title: Nanja Monja Obake
data.title_japanese: なんじゃもんじゃおばけ
data.synopsis: An anime made entirely in sumi-e following a child fox spirit and his morphing ability for haunting but he ends up getting scared himself.

data.title: Go! Go! Veggie-tan
data.synopsis: A fusion of drawn animation, stop-motion animation, and live-action sequences. Go! Go! Veggie-tan tells a quirky tale of a tomato and eggplant that fell to Earth from their spaceship after a meteorite hit them and they became enchanted by local playground equipment.

titles.title: ハスの妖精 ぼにょぼにょ

data.title: Hasu no Yousei: Bonyo Bonyo
data.title_japanese: ハスの妖精 ぼにょぼにょ
data.synopsis: A simple story of a the fairy Bonyo Bonyo being born from a lotus flower and making friends with frogs.

data.title: Neko no Sakusen
data.synopsis: Cats play baseball at night. When their ball goes over the fence a dog is indifferent on giving it back. The cat tries different methods to get revenge.

data.title: Gararin to Gororin
data.synopsis: Catepillar-like Gararin and stone-like Gororin are best friends. One day when they're playing they hear music and Gararin suddenly goes through a transformation.
